query_normalized: shuttermuse: capture-time photography guidance with mllms computer science
rationale: The paper focuses on creating a general evaluation benchmark for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) across 14 subtasks, but it does not address the specific mechanism of "capture-time photography guidance" or the application of MLLMs to real-time camera control.
